title: Mediterranean Chicken Crumble
description: A flavorful and crispy chicken dish with a Mediterranean twist, topped with a crunchy crumble.
instructions: Season the chicken with savory powder.
Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Sear the chicken until browned, then transfer to a baking dish.
In the same skillet, add curry powder and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Spread the curry mixture over the chicken.
Top the chicken with crumble and feta cheese (if using).
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through and the crumble is golden brown.
Garnish with chopped parsley and serve hot.
